ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Original Receipts On Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Garfinkle appearing for Patricia Olcomendy; William McInerney appearing for Jeanne Schwartz.

Mr. Garfinkle presented an amended proposed order in open court. The Petition was granted conditioned upon providing original receipts on distribution and the Court's review of the amended Order. The Court set a status hearing on August 27, 2007 for filing the receipts. If bond needs to be reduced, Counsel should sumbit an Ex Parte Petition.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Saephan; Clerks: R. Michael Diles and C. Joy Guandique.
